field.value: Fragment from the Res Gestae Inscription
Fragment from the Res Gestae Divi Augusti inscription at Monumentum Ancyranum.

GINTA.ROSTRATAE.NAVES.TRIREMES.A[VT.BIREM]ES.PLVRES.AVTEM / MINORES,INTER.SE.CONFLIXERVNT.Q[VIBVS.IN.]CLASSIBVS.PVGNAV[E] / RVNT.PRAETER.REMIGES.MILLIA.HOM[INVM.TR]IA.CIRCITER. / IN TEMPLIS.OMNIVM.CIVITATIVM.PR[OVINCIAE.]ASIAE.VICTOR ORNA / MENTA.REPOSVI.QVAE.SPOLIATIS.TEMP[LIS.IS.]CVM QVO.BELLVM.GESSESRAM / PRIVATIM.POSSEDERAT. STATVAE.[MEA]E.PEDESTRES.ET.EQVESTRES.ET.IN / QVADRIGEIS.ARGENTEAE.STETERVNT.IN VRBE.XXC.CIRCITER.QVAS.IPSE. / SVSTVLI.EXQVE.EA.PECVNIA.DONA.AVREA.IN AEDE.APOL[LI]NIS.MEO.NOMI / NE.ET.ILLORVM QVI.MIHI.STATVARVM.HONOREM.HABVERVNT.POSVI.
